languages.text: "Мы вышли на орбиту станции, Лорд-капитан. Ждем сигнала от Алтаря-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17". {n}Несколько секунд вокс-частота хранит тревожную тишину, которую вскоре нарушает дребезжащий голос.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Мы вышли на орбиту станции, Лорд-капитан. Ждем сигнала от Алтаря-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17". {n}Несколько секунд вокс-частота хранит тревожную тишину, которую вскоре нарушает дребезжащий голос.{/n}
traits.speaker: HighFactotum

languages.text: "We have entered the station's orbit, Lord Captain. Awaiting a signal from Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17." {n}For a few seconds, the vox-frequency carries only trepidatious silence, which is soon broken by a rattling voice.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Мы вышли на орбиту станции, Лорд-капитан. Ждем сигнала от Алтаря-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17". {n}Несколько секунд вокс-частота хранит тревожную тишину, которую вскоре нарушает дребезжащий голос.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "We have entered the station's orbit, Lord Captain. Awaiting a signal from Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17." {n}For a few seconds, the vox-frequency carries only trepidatious silence, which is soon broken by a rattling voice.{/n}

"We have entered the station's orbit, Lord Captain. Awaiting a signal from Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17." {n}For a few seconds, the vox-frequency carries only trepidatious silence, which is soon broken by a rattling voice.{/n}

"We have entered the station's orbit, Lord Captain. Awaiting a signal from Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17." {n}For a few seconds, the vox-frequency carries only trepidatious silence, which is soon broken by a rattling voice.{/n}

languages.text: 「我々は駅軌道に進入しました、艦長様。アルタール・テンプルからの信号を待っています」{n}数秒間、ヴォックス周波数は不安に満ちた沈黙のみを伝えます。そして、それはすぐに、ガタガタと音を立てながら、声が聞こえてくるようになります。{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have entered the station's orbit, Lord Captain. Awaiting a signal from Altar-Templum." {n}For a few seconds, the vox-frequency carries only trepidatious silence, which is soon broken by a rattling voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「我々は駅軌道に進入しました、艦長様。アルタール・テンプルからの信号を待っています。」{n}数秒間、ヴォックス周波数は不安に満ちた沈黙のみを伝えます。そして、それはすぐに、ガタガタと音を立てながら、声が聞こえてくるようになります。{/n}

languages.text: «Hemos entrado en la órbita de la estación, Lord Capitán. Esperando señal de Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17». {n}Durante unos segundos, la frecuencia de voco solo transmite un tenso silencio que se interrumpe con una voz temblorosa.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have entered the station's orbit, Lord Captain. Awaiting a signal from Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17." {n}For a few seconds, the vox-frequency carries only trepidatious silence, which is soon broken by a rattling voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Hemos entrado en la órbita de la estación, Lord Capitán. Esperando señal de Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17». {n}Durante unos segundos, la frecuencia de voco solo transmite un tenso silencio que se interrumpe con una voz temblorosa.{/n}

languages.text: "Wir sind jetzt im Orbit der Station, Lord Captain. Warten auf ein Signal von Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17." {n}Das betretene Schweigen auf der Voxfrequenz wird nach kurzer Zeit von einer rasselnden Stimme unterbrochen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have entered the station's orbit, Lord Captain. Awaiting a signal from Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17." {n}For a few seconds, the vox-frequency carries only trepidatious silence, which is soon broken by a rattling voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Wir sind jetzt im Orbit der Station, Lord Captain. Warten auf ein Signal von Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17." {n}Das betretene Schweigen auf der Voxfrequenz wird nach kurzer Zeit von einer rasselnden Stimme unterbrochen.{/n}

languages.text: « Nous nous trouvons à présent dans l'orbite de la station, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. En attente d'un signal en provenance d'Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. » {n}L'espace de quelques secondes, la fréquence-vox laisse place à un silence inquiet, soudain brisé par une voix grinçante.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have entered the station's orbit, Lord Captain. Awaiting a signal from Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17." {n}For a few seconds, the vox-frequency carries only trepidatious silence, which is soon broken by a rattling voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Nous nous trouvons à présent dans l'orbite de la station, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. En attente d'un signal en provenance d'Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. » {n}L'espace de quelques secondes, la fréquence-vox laisse place à un silence inquiet, soudain brisé par une voix grinçante.{/n}

languages.text: “舰长大人，我们已进入星站的轨道，正等待卡利西斯祭坛17号的信号。”{n}音阵频道中持续了几秒令人不安的寂静，但很快便被一道尖锐刺耳的声音打破。{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have entered the station's orbit, Lord Captain. Awaiting a signal from Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17." {n}For a few seconds, the vox-frequency carries only trepidatious silence, which is soon broken by a rattling voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，我们已进入星站的轨道，正等待卡利西斯祭坛17号的信号。”{n}音阵频道中持续了几秒令人不安的寂静，但很快便被一道尖锐刺耳的声音打破。{/n}

languages.text: "İstasyonun yörüngesine girdik Lord Kaptan. Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'den sinyal bekliyoruz." {n}Birkaç saniye boyunca voks frekansına hükmeden ürkütücü sessizlik, tıkırtılı bir ses ile nihayet bozuluyor.{/n}
